tools.name: scan_domain
tools.description:
Runs a free one-off security scan of the given domain and returns its grade (A–F), scan timestamp, and up to three top-priority issues with a permalink to the full report on siteguardian.io.

Use this when the user asks for a quick security check of a domain that is NOT yet under SiteGuardian monito

tools.name: list_monitored_domains
tools.description:
Returns the full list of domains under continuous SiteGuardian monitoring for the authenticated account. Each entry includes the domain, current security grade (A–F), timestamp of the last completed scan, and a relative dashboard URL.

Use this when the user asks what they are monitoring, wants an i

tools.name: get_domain_status
tools.description: Returns the current security grade (A–F), last-scan timestamp, and list of active issues for a domain that is ALREADY under SiteGuardian monitoring by the authenticated account. Each issue carries a stable id, a severity, a short title, and an impact description. The response also includes a relativ

tools.name: get_drift_events
tools.description: Returns recent configuration drift events for a domain under monitoring by the authenticated account — TLS changes, DNSSEC state changes, new or removed security headers, shifts in third-party JS hosts, new cookies. Each event carries its observed-at timestamp, a kind (tls/dnssec/cookies/js_hosts/he

tools.name: get_fix_recommendations
tools.description: Returns copy-paste-ready fix recommendations (nginx, Apache, DNS, shell) for the issues found on a domain the caller has already paid for — either an active Monitor/Compliance subscription covering the domain, OR a purchased one-off Report for the domain. Each recommendation carries a stable issue_i

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "list_monitored_domains" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Returns the full list of domains under continuous SiteGuardian monitoring for the authenticated account. Each entry includes the domain, current security grade …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_drift_events" references sensitive artifacts (cookie). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
